name: stitch-utilities
description: Design utilities for Google Stitch: generate DESIGN.md specs, enhance prompts, run stitch-loop workflows, and apply premium design standards.

interface.longDescription: Use supporting Google Stitch utilities to generate DESIGN.md specs, enhance UI prompts, run multi-page stitch-loop workflows, and apply premium design standards.
defaultPrompt: Generate a DESIGN.md for this Stitch project
Enhance this rough UI prompt for Stitch
Build a multi-page website with stitch-loop
